blocks.text: Bodø/Glimt stand on the verge of Champions League history
A club legend went nuclear after Sunday's flat 1-1 draw at Anfield. Liverpool must now overturn a one-goal deficit against Galatasaray on Wednesday — or their season loses its last European chapter.
🎾 Miami Open — Masters 1000/1000 hardcourt in full swing, Mon ongoing

items: ⚽ Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen — Emirates on edge, winner takes all
⚽ Real Madrid vs Manchester City — Haaland vs history, 21:00
⚽ Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain — nothing separating them at Stamford Bridge
